title: Desktop / Trade Floor Support Analyst
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Desktop / Trade Floor Support Analyst to provide high-touch, time-critical technology support to front-office trading desks and senior stakeholders. This role sits in a fast-paced trading environment where responsiveness, technical depth, and strong user engagement are essential.

Key Responsibilities

  • Provide L2/L3 deskside and trade floor support for traders, sales, and front-office users.

  • Support trading and market data platforms (e.g., Bloomberg, Refinitiv, OMS/EMS).

  • Act as first responder for trading-impacting incidents, performing rapid triage and escalation.

  • Deliver hands-on support for Windows desktops/laptops, multi-monitor trading setups, and peripherals.

  • Manage user onboarding/offboarding, hardware refreshes, OS builds, and application installations.

  • Collaborate closely with network, infrastructure, application, and security teams to resolve complex issues.

  • Participate in major incident management, change activities, and post-incident reviews.

  • Maintain accurate documentation, runbooks, and asset inventories.

Required Skills & Experience

  • 5+ years of experience in desktop/trade floor support within financial services or high-availability environments.

  • Strong Windows OS and end-user computing support experience.

  • Proven experience supporting front-office or trading users under strict SLA requirements.

  • Working knowledge of network fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN).

  • Familiarity with ITIL incident, problem, and change management processes.

  • Excellent communication skills and ability to operate calmly under pressure.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience supporting Bloomberg Terminal and market data platforms.

  • Exposure to enterprise networking, firewalls, or infrastructure support.

  • Experience working in global trading environments across regions.

Why Join Us

  • Work directly on the trade floor in a mission-critical environment

  • Exposure to front-office systems and senior stakeholders

  • Opportunity to deepen both desk-side and infrastructure skillsets

    Reg. No. R1110125 / EA License no.: 16S8066

postedCompany.description:
CHARTERHOUSE PTE. LTD.

Charterhouse is a boutique executive search firm with footprints in Asia, Australasia and the Middle East. We offer professional and bespoke contingency and retained search services across a variety of industrial sectors.

Recruitment is a people-focused business – our success and growth are reliant upon our people. Our team of consultants offers a blend of international recruitment experience, coupled with a platform of local market and industry knowledge. The development and success of our team requires continued focus, and we ensure that the latest market data, trends and information are at their fingertips. Performance and industry training is also regularly provided, and naturally the rigorous development of strong networks is vital to help us deliver the highest level of service for our clients.
postedCompany.name: CHARTERHOUSE PTE. LTD.
